    Class
    Description
    AdsorptionBed
    Adsorption bed unit operation supporting both steady-state and transient simulation.
    AdsorptionCycleController
    Controller for adsorption/desorption cycle scheduling.
    AdsorptionCycleController.CyclePhase
    Enumeration of the possible phases in an adsorption/desorption cycle.
    AdsorptionCycleController.PhaseStep
    Defines a single phase within a cycle schedule.
    PressureSwingAdsorptionBed
    Pressure-Swing-Adsorption (PSA) bed pre-configured for hydrogen purification.
    PressureSwingAdsorptionBed.SorbentType
    Sorbent selection for H2-purification service.
    PSACascade.CascadeConfiguration
    Standard industrial PSA cascade configurations and their recovery-uplift maps.
